title: Sync Specific Items only using VLOOKUP
excerpt: I know VLOOKUP lets me auto-link across multiple boards, but I have a use case where I don’t want to link entire boards—just sync specific items. Is that possible?

posts.author: Oliver.butler (Oliver Butler)
posts.cookedHtml: I know VLOOKUP lets me auto-link across multiple boards, but I have a use case where I don’t want to link entire boards—just sync specific items. Is that possible?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you clarify a bit more? ie could you use the Connected boards column?
